_comment: MirrorTrace (合规版) — MCP client config example for Claude Desktop / Cursor. Copy to your client config and replace <APIFY_TOKEN>. The actor whitelist is already bound to roger_1of1; the secret remains operator-managed.
_compliance_note: The ?tools= query parameter is a COMPLIANCE CONTROL. Only compliant actors are whitelisted into the tool layer. Private-scraping actors are intentionally absent, so an AI agent physically cannot call them. See configurator-notes.md.
_transport_note: As of 2026-04-01 Apify migrated the MCP endpoint from SSE to Streamable HTTP. Use the streamable-http transport (or a remote-MCP-capable client). Legacy SSE config is deprecated.

_mirrortrace-stdio-bridge-alternative._comment: Alternative for clients that only speak stdio: bridge to the remote streamable-http endpoint via mcp-remote. Same whitelist, same compliance boundary.
